title: Anticipatory Transformer: trajectory-aware attention bias
body:
## Summary
- Parameter-free trajectory bias derived from hidden state dynamics (running velocity + commitment scalar)
- Entropy-weighted training loss focuses gradient on high-uncertainty tokens
- Mixed int6 quantization + sliding window evaluation
- Orthogonal to existing leaderboard techniques (can stack with int5/BigramHash/SmearGate/SWA)

## Results (preliminary, RTX 2080 Ti)
- Trajectory-aware model beats baseline by 0.018 val loss
- 2.6x less overfitting (train-val gap 0.10 vs 0.26)
- Awaiting H100 validation on FineWeb

## Files
- `train_gpt.py` — Complete self-contained training script (1,335 lines)
- `README.md` — Approach documentation
- `submission.json` — Metadata

## Test plan
- [ ] Validate on 1xH100 with FineWeb sp1024
- [ ] Run 3 seeds for statistical significance
- [ ] Compare with/without trajectory bias (ablation)
- [ ] Final 8xH100 submission run
